changeSet.author: Kalibek_Turgumbayev
changeSet.sql: create type classifications_type as ( classification_number varchar(255), classification_type_id varchar(36), instance_id varchar(36), shared boolean, tenant_id varchar(255) );

changeSet.author: Kalibek_Turgumbayev
changeSet.sql:
create or replace function process_classifications( to_insert classifications_type[], to_delete classifications_type[] ) returns table ( classification_number varchar(255), classification_type_id varchar(36), instance_id varchar(36), shared boolean, tenant_id varchar(255) ) language sql as ' -- delete delete from instance_classification using unnest(to_delete) d where instance_classification.classification_number = d.classification_number and instance_classification.classification_type_id = d.classification_type_id and instance_classification.instance_id = d.instance_id and instance_classification.tenant_id = d.tenant_id; -- insert insert into instance_classification (classification_number, classification_type_id, tenant_id, instance_id) select classification_number, classification_type_id, tenant_id, instance_id from unnest(to_insert) ON CONFLICT (classification_type_id, classification_number, tenant_id, instance_id) DO UPDATE SET shared = EXCLUDED.shared;
-- return select distinct ic.classification_number, ic.classification_type_id, ic.instance_id, ic.shared, ic.tenant_id from instance_classification ic inner join unnest(array_cat(to_insert, to_delete)) i on ic.classification_number = i.classification_number and ic.classification_type_id = i.classification_type_id ';
